title: vulpia myuros subsp. megalura
intro: Vulpia myuros subsp. megalura, also known as greater sand cat's tail or big sand brome, is a type of grassy plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vulpia myuros subsp. megalura include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
